Our Services

Every journey, perfected.

From SeaTac at dawn to a Pike Place wedding at dusk — white-glove transport for every occasion.

  • Airport Transfers

    Flat-rate SeaTac and Boeing Field service. Flight tracking and meet-and-greet 24/7.

    Learn more →

  • Executive Transport

    Discreet black-car service for Seattle business travel and corporate events.

    Learn more →

  • Weddings

    Red-carpet arrivals, bridal-party logistics, and venue coordination.

    Learn more →

  • Hourly Charters

    Flexible by-the-hour service for tours, meetings, and a night on the town.

    Learn more →

  • Cruise Transfers

    Smith Cove and Bell Street pier transfers, luggage handled.

    Learn more →

  • Game Day

    Seahawks, Mariners, Sounders and Kraken — arrive without the parking.

    Learn more →

  • Special Occasions

    Birthdays, anniversaries, prom — every milestone in measured luxury.

    Learn more →

  • Infant & Booster Seats

    Pre-installed, properly fitted car seats for safe family travel.

    Learn more →
View all services →

Our Fleet

Travel in Absolute Comfort.

Five distinct vehicles. One consistent standard — meticulously maintained, professionally chauffeured, ready when you are.

Established 2010

A quieter standard of arrival.

For over a decade, Emerald City Limos has served the Greater Seattle area with chauffeurs who anticipate, vehicles that perform, and a standard of service that doesn’t announce itself.

Whether the destination is SeaTac at 4 a.m., a Pike Place wedding, a Seahawks Sunday, or a downtown board meeting — we deliver the same answer. Quietly, every time.

View all service areas →

Coverage

Greater Seattle — end to end.

Serving every major city across King, Snohomish and Pierce counties.
